title: 25 Gulden

obverse.description:
Green and brown-orange on multicolor underprint.
Central Bank Building in Paramaribo at center; athletes running at upper left. 
Vertical serial number in red color.
obverse.lettering:
CENTRALE BANK VAN SURINAME
25 Gulden
9 JULI 1991
VIJF EN TWINTIG GULDEN
obverse.lettering_translation:
Central Bank of Suriname
25 Gulden
July 9, 1991
Twenty Five Gulden

reverse.description: Coat of Arms at upper right; Anthony Nesty, olympic gold medalist in the 100m butterfly event in Seoul 1988; toucan at left
reverse.lettering:
VIJF EN TWINTIG Gulden

THOMAS DE LA RUE AND COMPANY LIMITED
NADRUK VERBODEN SURINAAMS WETBOEK VAN STRAFRECHT - ARTIKEL 260
reverse.lettering_translation:
Twenty Five Gulden
Thomas de La Rue and Company Limited
Emphasis Forbidden Suriname's Criminal Code - Article 260

comments:
Banknotes series AB500001 through AE900000 were issued (reprinted) in 1992;
Banknotes series AE900001 through AG400000 were issued (reprinted) in 1994.

P#138a, signature Henk Goedschalk (2nd type) - Goedschalk was President of the Central Bank of Suriname from January 1985 until January 1994 and from January 1997 until August 2000.

P#138b and P#138c, signature André Telting - President of the Central Bank of Suriname from March 1994 until February 1996 and from September 2000 until August 2010.

P#138d, signature Henk Goedschalk (3rd type) - Goedschalk was President of the Central Bank of Suriname from January 1985 until January 1994 and from January 1997 until August 2000.
